case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. ALYSON KELLOWAY et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $255.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $356.04 AS TO DEFENDANT KELLOWAY, ALYSON
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
